question: How do I reset my password?
answer: Go to the login page and click 'Forgot Password'. Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link.

question: How do I change my email address?
How do I delete my account?
answer: Please contact our support team to request account deletion. We'll process your request within 48 hours.

question: What is your SLA for support tickets?
answer: We respond to all support tickets within 24 hours on business days.

question: Do you offer phone support?
answer: Phone support is available for Enterprise customers only. Standard and Basic customers can use our chat and email support.

question: What are your support hours?
answer: Our support team is available Monday-Friday

question: How do I upgrade my plan?
answer: Go to Billing > Plan and select the plan you want to upgrade to. Follow the checkout process.

question: Can I downgrade my plan?
category: you can downgrade at any time. The new plan will take effect at your next billing cycle.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept all major credit cards
column4: and bank transfers for Enterprise customers.

question: Do you offer a free trial?
answer: Yes! We offer a 14-day free trial for all our plans. No credit card required.

question: How do I cancel my subscription?
answer: Go to Billing > Subscription and click Cancel Subscription. Your subscription will remain active until the end of your current billing period.

question: What programming languages do you support?
How do I integrate your API?
answer: Check out our comprehensive API documentation at docs.techsolutions.com/api. We also have SDKs for all major languages.

question: What is your uptime guarantee?
answer: We offer a 99.9% uptime SLA for all paid plans.

question: Do you have an on-premise deployment options?
answer: Yes! Enterprise customers can deploy our platform on-premise or in a private cloud.

question: How do I get API access?
answer: Sign up for an account and go to Settings > API Keys to generate your API key.
